title: Terrestrial
description: Liteweight modpack designed to add just some spice to Minecraft.
body:
Currently doing a re-haul with the pack. Trying to see what I can do to see what I want.
Some of the major mods include Epic Fight, Bosses Rises, Create, Farmer's Delight, Iron's Spells, Keepers of the Stones, Serene Seasons, Vampirism
